title: Darling Decorations!
body:
**Darling Decorations** is a cutecore inspired mod designed for those who like making adorable builds!

Darling Decorations adds multiple cute blocks to your world, including regular building blocks and new furniture/clutter items as well. 

This mod takes inspiration from various aesthetics, such as cutecore and puppycore. I have plans to try and include items in the future based on other cute aesthetics, such as cottagecore and kidcore as well!

While most of the decorations are cutesy and fun, expect to see some spooky decor to come as well to clash with the cuteness! :3

At the moment, furniture such as chairs are **not** functional as actual seats! Tables and shelves can still hold items, however. :)

Thank you for reading, and I hope you enjoy my mod! <3
